_comment: TEMPLATE — none of these MCP servers are active by default.
Every entry below is commented out via a leading underscore in
its key. To enable an entry, copy this file to .mcp.json at the
repo root, remove the leading underscore from the server name,
fill in any env var that begins with $, then restart Claude Code
See docs/MCP_SETUP.md for per-server setup and use cases.

_playwright._note: Interactive browser automation. Pairs with the e2e suite under scripts/. Most-installed MCP in the Claude Code ecosystem.

_postgres_pgedge_readonly._note: Read-only Postgres access. Create a dedicated mindex_readonly role per docs/MCP_SETUP.md — DO NOT point this at the write-capable production URL.

_filesystem_vardata._note: Sandboxed filesystem access rooted at /var/data (Render persistent disk). Useful when working with curriculum PDFs / SQLite snapshots / playwright browser cache without granting permission-everywhere.

_git._note: Structured git log/blame/diff. Useful for business-analyst-agent's last-changed-when queries and code-architect-agent's blame-driven duplication checks.

_fetch._note: Web page fetching with LLM-friendly conversion. Equivalent to built-in WebFetch but exposes the cleaned text more granularly.

_sequential_thinking._note: Structured scratchpad for multi-step reasoning. Overlaps with Plan mode and TaskList — enable only if you've found the existing tools insufficient.

_memory._note: Knowledge-graph persistent memory. Overlaps with the auto-memory system at ~/.claude/projects/.../memory/. Pick one, not both, to avoid drift.
